vulnerability.reference: Automated reliance on purifier creates single point of failure, reducing human oversight of data quality.
vulnerability.generated: ML engineers rely on purification pipelines that overfit to known attacks, providing no detection of novel perturbations.

impact.reference: Widespread model poisoning across multiple downstream applications hosted on the cloud platform.
impact.generated: Deployed models learn poison-triggered misclassifications, compromising prediction integrity and eroding trust in cloud ML services.

dose_response.reference: Overfitted purifiers fail to suppress novel poisoning perturbations, enabling adaptive attacks that, through automated cloud pipelines, lead to widespread model poisoning and eroded user trust.
dose_response.generated: Purification mechanisms with bypassable perturbation suppression, through engineers relying on automated purification pipelines, trigger reliance on overfitted pipelines that miss novel perturbations, leading to deployed models learning poison-triggered misclassifications, compromising prediction integrity and eroding trust in cloud ML services.
